personal.preferred_title: Senior AWS / Python / SQL Data Engineer

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and deep hands-on strength in Python, SQL, ETL/ELT pipelines, data modeling, and production data reliability. Strong background designing analytics-ready datasets, optimizing queries and schemas, building automated reporting pipelines, and supporting data quality, monitoring, and stakeholder-facing insights in financial-services environments. Experienced with AWS data services including S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and cloud-oriented pipeline modernization; actively extending lakehouse/warehouse skills across Snowflake, Databricks, Delta Lake, dbt, and modern cloud data patterns.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual reporting workflows with repeatable, analytics-ready data products.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and historical data structures supporting capacity forecasting, executive reporting, trend analysis, and operational decision-making.
Built AWS-oriented data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena-style query access, and Redshift workloads for scalable analytics and forecasting use cases.
Improved data quality and reliability through validation logic, reconciliation checks, troubleshooting workflows, and repeatable operational reporting used by senior stakeholders.
Developed Streamlit and Python visualization/reporting assets to surface capacity, cost, utilization, and risk insights for technical and leadership audiences.
Supported production operational needs including monitoring, incident analysis, performance troubleshooting, documentation, and runbook-style knowledge transfer.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for critical hospitality systems, supporting performance analytics and operational visibility.
Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to produce optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Integrated monitoring and performance-testing data to help teams identify bottlenecks, validate changes, and improve reliability across web and mobile systems.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as enterprise CA APM SME, managing large-scale monitored environments and building dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and performance reporting standards.
Created Perl and Korn shell data-extraction scripts to automate operational reporting and reduce manual weekly export work.
Partnered with application and infrastructure teams to diagnose performance issues, document findings, and mentor teams on monitoring and troubleshooting practices.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, validating correctness and preserving sub-second query latency.
Optimized transaction processing and database access patterns using C++, OCCI/OCI, SQL, and schema conversion utilities for large-scale migration reliability.
Built validation and testing utilities to verify migration accuracy across millions of transaction records.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an AI-driven capacity forecasting and analytics platform using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit. The system transformed telemetry into trusted reporting datasets and interactive insights for capacity, risk, and utilization decisions.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, PySpark, Parquet, and Bedrock concepts for scalable ingestion, transformation, query access, and AI-enabled analytics.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic Python workflow for semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, resume tailoring, quality gates, JSON artifacts, and application tracking. Used FAISS, sentence-transformers, Claude Code, Grok API, and Streamlit.
